name: Grand China Energy Group Limited
summary: Grand China Energy Group Limited, through its subsidiaries, engages in the exploration, development, mining, production, and sale of coal properties in the People's Republic of China. It owns and operates a coal mine in Shangzhai Village, Yongding County, Longyan City, Fujian Province. The company was formerly known as SGB International Holdings Inc. and changed its name to Grand China Energy Group Limited on August 2014. Grand China Energy Group Limited is based in Causeway Bay, Hong Kong.
